member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.ConfigServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for configuring API client options in an .
member.remarks: This class contains methods to simplify the configuration of API client options, including binding configuration sections or using custom configuration actions.

member.param: The to which the configuration will be added.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.ConfigServiceCollectionExtensions.<G>$7B30185E57B8298C6754F16C0BCF4773.ConfigureApiClient(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Configures the API client options for the application using the specified configuration section.
member.param: The instance containing the configuration data.
The name of the configuration section to bind to the . Defaults to if not specified.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.ConfigServiceCollectionExtensions.<G>$7B30185E57B8298C6754F16C0BCF4773.ConfigureApiClient(System.Action{MyLab.ApiClient.Options.ApiClientOptions})
member.summary: Configures API client options for the application.

member.summary: The base class for method attributes

member.summary: The base class for api client parameter attributes

member.summary: Determines request parameter which place in content with binary format

member.summary: Determines api request parameter which place in content

member.summary: Determines request parameter which place in URL query

member.summary: Gets the HTTP method used by the endpoint (e.g., GET, POST, PUT, DELETE).

member.summary: Gets the list of HTTP status codes that are expected as valid responses for the endpoint.

member.summary: Represent parameter which is a collection of the headers, and it will be added into headers

member.summary: Represent parameter which will be added into headers

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.JsonSerialization.IJsonSerializer
member.summary: Provides methods for serializing objects to JSON and deserializing JSON strings to objects.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.JsonSerialization.IJsonSerializer.Deserialize``1(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes the specified JSON string into an object of the specified type.
member.typeparam: The type of the object to deserialize to.
member.returns: An object of type deserialized from the JSON string.
member.exception: Thrown when the string is null, empty, or consists only of white-space characters.
Thrown when the JSON string is invalid or cannot be deserialized into the specified type.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.JsonSerialization.IJsonSerializer.Deserialize(System.String,System.Type)
member.summary: Deserializes the specified JSON string into an object of the specified type.
member.param: The target type of the object to deserialize to.
member.returns: An object of the specified deserialized from the JSON string.
member.exception: Thrown when the string is null, empty, or consists only of white-space characters.
Thrown when the JSON string is invalid or cannot be deserialized into the specified type.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.JsonSerialization.IJsonSerializer.Serialize``1(``0)
member.summary: Serializes the specified object into a JSON string.
member.typeparam: The type of the object to serialize.
member.returns: A JSON string representation of the specified object.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.JsonSerialization.MicrosoftJsonSerializer
member.summary: A JSON serializer implementation using the Microsoft JSON library.
member.remarks: This class provides methods for serializing objects to JSON strings and deserializing JSON strings to objects. It is configured using the class to customize serialization behavior.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.JsonSerialization.NewtonJsonSerializer
member.summary: A JSON serializer implementation using Newtonsoft.Json.
member.remarks: This class provides methods for serializing objects to JSON strings and deserializing JSON strings to objects. It utilizes for configuring serialization behavior.

member.name: F:MyLab.ApiClient.JsonSerialization.NewtonJsonSerializer.Default
member.summary: Provides a default instance of configured with default JSON serialization settings.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Options.ApiClientOptions
member.summary: Represents the configuration options for API clients, including endpoints, JSON serialization settings, and URL-encoded form serialization settings.

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Options.ApiClientOptions.Dumper
member.summary: Gets or sets the HTTP message dumper used to log or inspect HTTP requests and responses.

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Options.ApiEndpointOptions.SkipServerSslCertVerification
member.summary: Do not verify the server SSL certificate

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Options.ApiJsonSettings.IgnoreNullValues
member.summary: Ignores null fields. True by default.

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Options.ApiUrlFormSettings.EscapeSymbols
member.summary: Converts symbols to its escaped representation. True by default

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Options.ApiUrlFormSettings.IgnoreNullValues
member.summary: Ignores null fields. False by default.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.RequestFactoring.ContentFactoring.IMultipartContentParameter
member.summary: Specifies input parameter which will be used to create request multipart content

member.summary: Implement to add parts to content

member.summary: Creates req factoring settings from app options

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.CallDetails.IsOK
member.summary: Indicates whether the service call was successful based on the HTTP status code.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.CallDetails.ReadContentAsync``1
member.summary: Reads and deserializes the content of the HTTP response message into an object of the specified type.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ContentDeserializing.IContentDeserializer
member.summary: Defines a contract for deserializing HTTP content into objects of a specified type.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ContentDeserializing.IContentDeserializer.Predicate(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the deserializer can process content for the specified return type.
member.param: The type of the object to be deserialized.
member.returns: if the deserializer supports the specified return type; otherwise, .

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ContentDeserializing.IContentDeserializer.DeserializeAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpContent,System.Type)
member.summary: Asynchronously deserializes the provided HTTP content into an object of the specified type.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ContentDeserializing.IContentDeserializerProvider
member.summary: Provides a mechanism to retrieve a content deserializer capable of processing a specific target type.
member.remarks: This interface is designed to support the selection of an appropriate implementation of based on the target type for deserialization.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ContentDeserializing.IContentDeserializerProvider.GetRequiredDeserializer(System.Type)
member.summary: Retrieves a content deserializer that is capable of processing the specified target type.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ContentDeserializing.UnexpectedResponseContentTypeException
member.summary: Throws when response content has unexpected media type

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ContentDeserializing.UnexpectedResponseContentTypeException.ActualMediaType
member.summary: Gets the actual media type of the response content that caused the exception.

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.ResponseProcessing.ResponseCodeException
member.summary: Throws when got an unexpected response HTTP code

member.summary: Contains tools to create dump from http request and response

member.summary: Default max body size for dumping

member.summary: DumpAsync text when body is too large

member.summary: Set to customize request body size which is maximum dor dumping

member.name: P:MyLab.ApiClient.Tools.HttpMessageDumper.MaxResponseBodySize
member.summary: Set to customize response body size which is maximum dor dumping

member.name: T:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.IRequestProcessor
member.summary: Defines a mechanism for processing HTTP requests in an API client.

member.name: M:MyLab.ApiClient.Usage.IRequestProcessor.ProcessRequestAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpRequestMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Processes an HTTP request asynchronously and returns the corresponding HTTP response.
